source.author: Harvey AI
source.notes: 1,251 tasks across 24 practice areas. Upstream ships its own agent loop with raw API integrations, not a standard CLI agent. BenchFlow ported the harness as an ACP agent shim (harvey_lab_acp_shim.py) for parity testing.

ported_agents: harvey-lab-harness — ACP shim wrapping Harvey LAB's native agent loop (6 tools, same system prompt)

parity.notes: Stratified across 24 practice areas, ran on Modal (concurrency=20). All disagreements from model non-determinism.
